name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished slides without the generic, over-designed look of typical AI output.
problem: Creating professional presentations is time-consuming, but most AI slide tools produce visually bland or overly templated results that undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by combining AI assistance with design-forward output that looks intentional and human-crafted. This helps teams communicate ideas visually without sacrificing aesthetic quality.
useCases: Sales teams building client-facing pitch decks that need to look premium
Marketers creating campaign or strategy presentations quickly
Founders preparing investor decks with a polished, distinctive visual style
Consultants assembling client reports and deliverables without a dedicated designer
